title: Pack of 10 Rectangle Bamboo Natural Color Wicker Bread Basket Retail Shop Display Christmas Hamper (L)
features: 【EXTRAORDINARY OUTLOOK】Adding a touch of sophistication ideal for serving a variety of delicacies. The bamboo look creates a sense of countryside relaxation with a checkered pattern that brightens the basket.

【SUSTAINABLE QUALITY】Crafted from durable wicker combining strength with lightweight features. Handwoven design adds rustic charm with vertical and horizontal weaving ensuring stability and durability.

【APPLIED OCCASIONS】Versatile for various uses as fruit baskets, garden storage, bedroom or living room containers, Easter egg hunts, gift hampers, or window displays. Complements any setting or event seamlessly.
【PRODUCT COMBINATION】Includes a set of 10 identical baskets providing practical storage solutions for multiple uses or backup options ensuring both functionality and style.

【PRODUCT SPECIFICATION】10-piece set available in five sizes (all measurements are top edge dimensions): S (26cm x 16cm x 8.5cm), M (30cm x 20cm x 9cm), L (34cm x 25cm x 9cm), XL (37cm x 27cm x 9cm), XXL (43cm x 34cm x 10cm), suitable for various storage needs.
description: Natural bamboo wicker hampers 10 same size baskets in one package No chemical things used in production Suitable for storing fruits, bread and vegetables XX Large Size: Top Length 43 cm x Width 34 cm Depth 10 cm Base Length 36 cm x Width 26 cm Extra Large Size: Top Length 37 cm x Width 27 cm Depth 9 cm Base Length 30 cm x Width 21 cm Large Size: Top Length 34 cm x Width 25 cm Depth 9 cm Base Length 28 cm x Width 18 cm Medium Size: Top Length 30 cm x Width 20 cm Depth 9 cm Base Length 25 cm x Width 15 cm Small Size: Top Length 26 cm x Width 16 cm Depth 8.5 cm Base Length 21 cm x Width 11 cm Please be noted that for handmade crafts, colors and measurements allow 5% tolerance
